15分钟内正在使用和等待使用 CPU 的平均任务数，取 /proc/loadav: Average number of tasks using and waiting for CPU within 15 minutes, taken from the third column of /proc/loadavg (not available on Windows). Requires the monitoring agent to be installed
1分钟内正在使用和等待使用 CPU 的平均任务数，取 /proc/loadavg: Average number of tasks using and waiting for CPU within 1 minute, taken from the first column of /proc/loadavg (not available on Windows). Requires the monitoring agent to be installed
5分钟内正在使用和等待使用 CPU 的平均任务数，取 /proc/loadavg: Average number of tasks using and waiting for CPU within 5 minutes, taken from the second column of /proc/loadavg (not available on Windows). Requires the monitoring agent to be installed
CVM 在访问或被访问时所建立的传输层连接数量， 这个字段是在宿主机采集的，包括: Number of transport-layer connections established when the CVM accesses or is accessed. This field is collected on the host and covers five-tuple connections such as tcp and udp, providing comprehensive statistics across all protocols including tcp/udp/icmp.
InnoDB平均获取行锁时间: InnoDB Average Row Lock Wait Time
Key命中/(Key命中+KeyMiss)，该指标可以反应Cache Miss的: Key hits / (key hits + key misses); this metric reflects cache miss conditions
LB 到后端的新建连接数。在统计粒度内，从负载均衡到后端 RS 的新建连接数: New connections from the load balancer to the backend RS. Number of new connections established from the load balancer to the backend RS within the statistical granularity
Proxy命令执行错误的次数，例如命令不存在、参数错误等情况: Number of command execution errors on the proxy, such as nonexistent commands or invalid parameters
Topic 占用磁盘的消息总量（不包含副本），按照所选择的时间粒度取最新值: Total message volume of the topic on disk (excluding replicas), taking the latest value at the selected time granularity
Topic 消费流量（不包含副本产生的流量），按照一分钟时间粒度统计求和: Topic consumption traffic (excluding traffic generated by replicas), summed at one-minute granularity
Topic 消费消息条数，按照一分钟时间粒度统计求和: Number of messages consumed by the topic, summed at one-minute granularity
Topic 生产流量（不包含副本产生的流量），按照一分钟时间粒度统计求和: Topic production traffic (excluding traffic generated by replicas), summed at one-minute granularity
Topic 生产消息条数，按照一分钟时间粒度统计求和: Number of messages produced by the topic, summed at one-minute granularity
Topic 级别消费请求次数，按照一分钟时间粒度统计求和: Number of topic-level consumption requests, summed at one-minute granularity
Topic 级别生产请求次数，按照一分钟时间粒度统计求和: Number of topic-level production requests, summed at one-minute granularity
Topic 落盘的消息总条数（不包含副本），按照所选择的时间粒度取最新值: Total number of messages persisted to disk by the topic (excluding replicas), taking the latest value at the selected time granularity
Topic最大生产流量(不含副本流量): Topic Max Production Traffic (Excluding Replica Traffic)
proxy到redis server的写命令平均执行时延，读命令分类，请查看文档: Average execution latency of write commands from proxy to redis server. For read command classification, see the monitoring documentation
proxy到redis server的执行时延99%水位线: P99 execution latency from proxy to redis server
proxy到redis server的执行时延平均值: Average execution latency from proxy to redis server
proxy到redis server的执行时延最大值: Max execution latency from proxy to redis server
proxy到redis server的读写命令之外的命令平均执行时延，其他命令分: Average execution latency of commands other than read and write commands from proxy to redis server. For other command classification, see the monitoring documentation
proxy到redis server的读命令平均执行时延，读命令分类，请查看文档: Average execution latency of read commands from proxy to redis server. For read command classification, see the monitoring documentation
一个统计周期(1min)内的其他请求数（除 SELECT, INSERT, UP: Number of other requests (requests other than SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE) within one statistical period (1 min)
一个统计周期(1min)内的写请求数: Number of write requests within one statistical period (1 min)
一个统计周期(1min)内的读写请求数: Number of read and write requests within one statistical period (1 min)
一个统计周期(1min)内的读请求数: Number of read requests within one statistical period (1 min)
一个统计周期内的平均每秒全表扫描的 tuple 数量: Average number of tuples scanned by full table scans per second within a statistical period
一个统计周期内的平均每秒删除的 tuple 数量: Average number of tuples deleted per second within a statistical period
一个统计周期内的平均每秒回滚事务数: Average number of transactions rolled back per second within a statistical period
一个统计周期内的平均每秒提交事务数: Average number of transactions committed per second within a statistical period
一个统计周期内的平均每秒插入的 tuple 数量: Average number of tuples inserted per second within a statistical period
一个统计周期内的平均每秒更新的 tupe 数量: Average number of tuples updated per second within a statistical period
一个统计周期内的平均每秒索引扫描的 tuple 数量: Average number of tuples scanned by index scans per second within a statistical period
一个统计周期内的慢查询个数: Number of slow queries within a statistical period
一个统计周期内的所有 SQL 语句执行的命中率: Hit ratio of all SQL statements executed within a statistical period
一个统计周期内的所有死锁数: Total number of deadlocks within a statistical period
一次统计周期内所有 SQL 语句的平均执行时延: Average execution latency of all SQL statements within a statistical period
一次统计周期内最短 TOP10 的 SQL 平均执行时延: Average execution latency of the Top 10 shortest SQL statements within a statistical period
一次统计周期内最长 TOP10 的 SQL 平均执行时延: Average execution latency of the Top 10 longest SQL statements within a statistical period
主题监控指标（受模版变量 Topic Total 控制）: Topic Metrics (Controlled by the Topic Total Template Variable)
内网入流量实际使用和最大流量比: Ratio of actual private network inbound traffic to maximum traffic
内网出流量实际使用和最大流量比: Ratio of actual private network outbound traffic to maximum traffic
内网网卡的平均每秒入包量: Average inbound packets per second on the private network NIC
内网网卡的平均每秒入流量: Average inbound traffic per second on the private network NIC
内网网卡的平均每秒出包量: Average outbound packets per second on the private network NIC
内网网卡的平均每秒出流量: Average outbound traffic per second on the private network NIC
写命令执行次数，读命令分类，请查看文档监控说明: Number of write command executions. For read command classification, see the monitoring documentation
副本节点的相对主节点命令延迟长度: Command replication lag of the replica node relative to the primary node
后端服务器返回的 2xx 状态码: 2xx Status Codes Returned by Backend Server
后端服务器返回的 3xx 状态码: 3xx Status Codes Returned by Backend Server
后端服务器返回的 404 状态码: 404 Status Codes Returned by Backend Server
后端服务器返回的 499 状态码: 499 Status Codes Returned by Backend Server
后端服务器返回的 4xx 状态码: 4xx Status Codes Returned by Backend Server
后端服务器返回的 502 状态码: 502 Status Codes Returned by Backend Server
后端服务器返回的 503 状态码: 503 Status Codes Returned by Backend Server
后端服务器返回的 504 状态码: 504 Status Codes Returned by Backend Server
后端服务器返回的 5xx 状态码: 5xx Status Codes Returned by Backend Server
命令执行错误的次数，例如命令不存在、参数错误等情况: Number of command execution errors, such as nonexistent commands or invalid parameters
命令访问的Key个数: Number of Keys Accessed by Commands
回滚串行查询数: Parallel Queries Rolled Back to Serial
在统计周期内，负载均衡的 SNAT IP 与后端 RS 每分钟建立连接的失败次数: Number of failed connections established per minute between the SNAT IP of the load balancer and the backend RS within the statistical period
在统计周期内，负载均衡的 SNAT IP 与后端服务器每分钟建立连接的失败次数。: Number of failed connections established per minute between the SNAT IP of the load balancer and backend servers within the statistical period. This metric is in beta; to use it, submit a beta application
在统计周期内，负载均衡的 SNAT IP 每分钟的并发连接数: Concurrent connections per minute on the SNAT IP of the load balancer within the statistical period
在统计周期内，负载均衡的 SNAT IP 的端口使用率。端口使用率 = SNAT: Port usage of the SNAT IP of the load balancer within the statistical period. Port usage = SNAT concurrent connections / (number of SNAT IPs x 55000 x number of RS)

Port usage of the SNAT IP of the load balancer within the statistical period. Port usage = SNAT concurrent connections / (number of SNAT IPs x 55000 x number of servers). This metric is in beta; to use it, submit a beta application
在统计周期内，负载均衡的健康检查异常个数: Number of abnormal health checks of the load balancer within the statistical period
在统计周期内，负载均衡的健康检查正常个数: Number of normal health checks of the load balancer within the statistical period
在统计粒度内的某一时刻，从客户端到负载均衡或监听器上的并发连接数: Concurrent connections from clients to the load balancer or listener at a given moment within the statistical granularity
在统计粒度内的某一时刻，从客户端到负载均衡或监听器上的并发连接数相比性能容量型规: Utilization of concurrent connections from clients to the load balancer or listener at a given moment within the statistical granularity, relative to the concurrent connection limit of the performance capacity spec. This metric is supported only for performance capacity instances and rate-limited shared instances
在统计粒度内的某一时刻，从客户端到负载均衡或监听器上的新建连接数相比性能容量型规: Utilization of new connections from clients to the load balancer or listener at a given moment within the statistical granularity, relative to the new connection limit of the performance capacity spec. This metric is supported only for performance capacity instances and rate-limited shared instances
在统计粒度内的某一时刻，从客户端到负载均衡或监听器上的活跃连接数: Active connections from clients to the load balancer or listener at a given moment within the statistical granularity
在统计粒度内的某一时刻，从客户端到负载均衡或监听器上的非活跃连接数: Inactive connections from clients to the load balancer or listener at a given moment within the statistical granularity
在统计粒度内的某一时刻，负载均衡的 QPS 相比性能容量型规格的 QPS 性能上: Utilization of the load balancer QPS at a given moment within the statistical granularity, relative to the QPS limit of the performance capacity spec. This metric is supported only for performance capacity instances and rate-limited shared instances, and only at the instance dimension
在统计粒度内，从客户端到负载均衡或监听器上的新建连接数: New connections from clients to the load balancer or listener within the statistical granularity
在统计粒度内，从负载均衡到后端 RS 的新建连接数: New connections from the load balancer to the backend RS within the statistical granularity
在统计粒度内，从负载均衡到后端 RS 的连接数: Connections from the load balancer to the backend RS within the statistical granularity
在统计粒度内，后端 RS 向负载均衡每秒发送的数据包数量: Number of packets sent per second from the backend RS to the load balancer within the statistical granularity
在统计粒度内，后端 RS 流出到负载均衡所用的带宽: Bandwidth used by the backend RS to send traffic to the load balancer within the statistical granularity
在统计粒度内，后端服务器流出到负载均衡的流量: Traffic sent from backend servers to the load balancer within the statistical granularity
在统计粒度内，后端服务器返回 2xx 状态码的个数。此指标为七层监听器独有指标: Number of 2xx status codes returned by backend servers within the statistical granularity. This metric is exclusive to Layer 7 listeners
在统计粒度内，后端服务器返回 3xx 状态码的个数。此指标为七层监听器独有指标: Number of 3xx status codes returned by backend servers within the statistical granularity. This metric is exclusive to Layer 7 listeners
在统计粒度内，后端服务器返回 404 状态码的个数。此指标为七层监听器独有指标: Number of 404 status codes returned by backend servers within the statistical granularity. This metric is exclusive to Layer 7 listeners
在统计粒度内，后端服务器返回 499 状态码的个数。此指标为七层监听器独有指标: Number of 499 status codes returned by backend servers within the statistical granularity. This metric is exclusive to Layer 7 listeners
在统计粒度内，后端服务器返回 4xx 状态码的个数。此指标为七层监听器独有指标: Number of 4xx status codes returned by backend servers within the statistical granularity. This metric is exclusive to Layer 7 listeners
在统计粒度内，后端服务器返回 502 状态码的个数。此指标为七层监听器独有指标: Number of 502 status codes returned by backend servers within the statistical granularity. This metric is exclusive to Layer 7 listeners
在统计粒度内，后端服务器返回 503 状态码的个数。此指标为七层监听器独有指标: Number of 503 status codes returned by backend servers within the statistical granularity. This metric is exclusive to Layer 7 listeners
在统计粒度内，后端服务器返回 504 状态码的个数。此指标为七层监听器独有指标: Number of 504 status codes returned by backend servers within the statistical granularity. This metric is exclusive to Layer 7 listeners
在统计粒度内，后端服务器返回 5xx 状态码的个数。此指标为七层监听器独有指标: Number of 5xx status codes returned by backend servers within the statistical granularity. This metric is exclusive to Layer 7 listeners
在统计粒度内，客户端向负载均衡每秒发送的数据包数量: Number of packets sent per second from clients to the load balancer within the statistical granularity
在统计粒度内，客户端流入到负载均衡所用的带宽: Bandwidth used by clients to send traffic to the load balancer within the statistical granularity
在统计粒度内，客户端流入到负载均衡的流量: Traffic sent from clients to the load balancer within the statistical granularity
在统计粒度内，客户端通过内网访问负载均衡所用的带宽利用率。此指标仅标准账户类型支: Bandwidth usage of clients accessing the load balancer over the private network within the statistical granularity. This metric is supported only for standard account types, not for legacy account types. This metric is in beta; to use it, submit a ticket. This metric is supported only for performance capacity instances and rate-limited shared instances
在统计粒度内，客户端通过内网访问负载均衡时丢弃的带宽。此指标仅标准账户类型支持，: Bandwidth dropped when clients access the load balancer over the private network within the statistical granularity. This metric is supported only for standard account types, not for legacy account types
在统计粒度内，客户端通过内网访问负载均衡时丢弃的数据包。此指标仅标准账户类型支持: Packets dropped when clients access the load balancer over the private network within the statistical granularity. This metric is supported only for standard account types, not for legacy account types
在统计粒度内，客户端通过外网访问负载均衡所用的带宽利用率。此指标仅标准账户类型支: Bandwidth usage of clients accessing the load balancer over the public network within the statistical granularity. This metric is supported only for standard account types, not for legacy account types. This metric is in beta; to use it, submit a ticket. This metric is supported only for performance capacity instances and rate-limited shared instances
在统计粒度内，客户端通过外网访问负载均衡时丢弃的带宽。此指标仅标准账户类型支持，: Bandwidth dropped when clients access the load balancer over the public network within the statistical granularity. This metric is supported only for standard account types, not for legacy account types
在统计粒度内，客户端通过外网访问负载均衡时丢弃的数据包。此指标仅标准账户类型支持: Packets dropped when clients access the load balancer over the public network within the statistical granularity. This metric is supported only for standard account types, not for legacy account types
在统计粒度内，负载均衡向后端 RS 每秒发送的数据包数量: Number of packets sent per second from the load balancer to the backend RS within the statistical granularity
在统计粒度内，负载均衡向客户端每秒发送的数据包数量: Number of packets sent per second from the load balancer to clients within the statistical granularity
在统计粒度内，负载均衡响应超时的个数。此指标为七层监听器独有指标: Number of load balancer response timeouts within the statistical granularity. This metric is exclusive to Layer 7 listeners
在统计粒度内，负载均衡或监听器上丢弃的请求数。此指标为七层监听器独有指标。此指标: Number of requests dropped on the load balancer or listener within the statistical granularity. This metric is exclusive to Layer 7 listeners. This metric is supported only for standard account types, not for legacy account types
在统计粒度内，负载均衡或监听器上丢弃的连接数。此指标仅标准账户类型支持，传统账户: Number of connections dropped on the load balancer or listener within the statistical granularity. This metric is supported only for standard account types, not for legacy account types
在统计粒度内，负载均衡每分钟的成功请求数。此指标为七层监听器独有指标: Number of successful requests per minute on the load balancer within the statistical granularity. This metric is exclusive to Layer 7 listeners
在统计粒度内，负载均衡每秒钟的请求数。此指标为七层监听器独有指标: Number of requests per second on the load balancer within the statistical granularity. This metric is exclusive to Layer 7 listeners
在统计粒度内，负载均衡流入到后端 RS 所用的带宽: Bandwidth used by the load balancer to send traffic to the backend RS within the statistical granularity
在统计粒度内，负载均衡流出到客户端所用的带宽: Bandwidth used by the load balancer to send traffic to clients within the statistical granularity
在统计粒度内，负载均衡流出到客户端的流量: Traffic sent from the load balancer to clients within the statistical granularity
在统计粒度内，负载均衡的平均响应时间。此指标为七层监听器独有指标: Average response time of the load balancer within the statistical granularity. This metric is exclusive to Layer 7 listeners
在统计粒度内，负载均衡的平均请求时间。此指标为七层监听器独有指标: Average request time of the load balancer within the statistical granularity. This metric is exclusive to Layer 7 listeners
在统计粒度内，负载均衡的最大响应时间。此指标为七层监听器独有指标: Max response time of the load balancer within the statistical granularity. This metric is exclusive to Layer 7 listeners
在统计粒度内，负载均衡的最大请求时间。此指标为七层监听器独有指标: Max request time of the load balancer within the statistical granularity. This metric is exclusive to Layer 7 listeners
在统计粒度内，负载均衡访问内网所用的带宽使用率。此指标仅标准账户类型支持，传统账: Bandwidth usage of the load balancer accessing the private network within the statistical granularity. This metric is supported only for standard account types, not for legacy account types. This metric is in beta; to use it, submit a ticket. This metric is supported only for performance capacity instances and rate-limited shared instances
在统计粒度内，负载均衡访问内网时丢弃的带宽。此指标仅标准账户类型支持，传统账户类: Bandwidth dropped when the load balancer accesses the private network within the statistical granularity. This metric is supported only for standard account types, not for legacy account types
在统计粒度内，负载均衡访问内网时丢弃的数据包。此指标仅标准账户类型支持，传统账户: Packets dropped when the load balancer accesses the private network within the statistical granularity. This metric is supported only for standard account types, not for legacy account types
在统计粒度内，负载均衡访问外网所用的带宽使用率。此指标仅标准账户类型支持，传统账: Bandwidth usage of the load balancer accessing the public network within the statistical granularity. This metric is supported only for standard account types, not for legacy account types. This metric is in beta; to use it, submit a ticket. This metric is supported only for performance capacity instances and rate-limited shared instances
在统计粒度内，负载均衡访问外网时丢弃的带宽。此指标仅标准账户类型支持，传统账户类: Bandwidth dropped when the load balancer accesses the public network within the statistical granularity. This metric is supported only for standard account types, not for legacy account types
在统计粒度内，负载均衡访问外网时丢弃的数据包。此指标仅标准账户类型支持，传统账户: Packets dropped when the load balancer accesses the public network within the statistical granularity. This metric is supported only for standard account types, not for legacy account types
在统计粒度内，负载均衡返回 3xx 状态码的个数（负载均衡和后端服务器返回码之和: Number of 3xx status codes returned by the load balancer within the statistical granularity (sum of the return codes of the load balancer and backend servers). This metric is exclusive to Layer 7 listeners
在统计粒度内，负载均衡返回 404 状态码的个数（负载均衡和后端服务器返回码之和: Number of 404 status codes returned by the load balancer within the statistical granularity (sum of the return codes of the load balancer and backend servers). This metric is exclusive to Layer 7 listeners
在统计粒度内，负载均衡返回 499 状态码的个数（负载均衡和后端服务器返回码之和: Number of 499 status codes returned by the load balancer within the statistical granularity (sum of the return codes of the load balancer and backend servers). This metric is exclusive to Layer 7 listeners
在统计粒度内，负载均衡返回 4xx 状态码的个数（负载均衡和后端服务器返回码之和: Number of 4xx status codes returned by the load balancer within the statistical granularity (sum of the return codes of the load balancer and backend servers). This metric is exclusive to Layer 7 listeners
在统计粒度内，负载均衡返回 502 状态码的个数（负载均衡和后端服务器返回码之和: Number of 502 status codes returned by the load balancer within the statistical granularity (sum of the return codes of the load balancer and backend servers). This metric is exclusive to Layer 7 listeners
在统计粒度内，负载均衡返回 503 状态码的个数（负载均衡和后端服务器返回码之和: Number of 503 status codes returned by the load balancer within the statistical granularity (sum of the return codes of the load balancer and backend servers). This metric is exclusive to Layer 7 listeners
在统计粒度内，负载均衡返回 504 状态码的个数（负载均衡和后端服务器返回码之和: Number of 504 status codes returned by the load balancer within the statistical granularity (sum of the return codes of the load balancer and backend servers). This metric is exclusive to Layer 7 listeners
在统计粒度内，负载均衡返回 5xx 状态码的个数（负载均衡和后端服务器返回码之和: Number of 5xx status codes returned by the load balancer within the statistical granularity (sum of the return codes of the load balancer and backend servers). This metric is exclusive to Layer 7 listeners
在采样周期内有百分之几的时间 CPU 空闲并且有仍未完成的 I/O 请求: Percentage of time in the sampling period during which the CPU was idle while I/O requests were still outstanding
基础 CPU 使用率通过宿主机采集上报，无须安装监控组件即可查看数据，子机高负载: Basic CPU usage is collected and reported by the host. No monitoring agent is required to view the data, and data can still be collected and reported when the instance is under high load
处于 ESTABLISHED 状态的 TCP 连接数量: Number of TCP connections in the ESTABLISHED state
备库回放 LSN 与主实例当前 LSN 之间的大小差异，对于主实例而言，此指标可: Size difference between the replay LSN of the standby and the current LSN of the primary instance. For a primary instance, this metric reflects the failover RTO; for a read-only instance, it reflects the data delay
备库日志发送与回放位置差异: Standby Log Send and Replay Position Difference
备库落盘LSN与主实例当前LSN之间的大小差异，对于主实例而言，此指标可以体现出: Size difference between the flushed LSN of the standby and the current LSN of the primary instance. For a primary instance, this metric reflects the amount of data loss on failover; for a read-only instance, it reflects the data delay
外网平均每秒入流量速率，当前粒度数据为60秒总流量/60秒计算得出，该数据为 E: Average public network inbound traffic rate per second. Data at the current granularity is calculated as total traffic in 60 seconds / 60 seconds. This data is the sum of the public network outbound/inbound bandwidth of EIP + CLB + CVM
外网平均每秒出流量速率，当前粒度数据为60秒总流量/60秒计算得出，该数据为 E: Average public network outbound traffic rate per second. Data at the current granularity is calculated as total traffic in 60 seconds / 60 seconds. This data is the sum of the public network outbound/inbound bandwidth of EIP + CLB + CVM
外网网卡的平均每秒入包量: Average inbound packets per second on the public network NIC
外网网卡的平均每秒出包量: Average outbound packets per second on the public network NIC
外网网卡的平均每秒出流量: Average outbound traffic per second on the public network NIC
子机 utc 时间和 ntp 时间差值: Difference between the instance UTC time and the NTP time
存储监控(需要采集云硬盘数据): Storage Monitoring (Requires Cloud Disk Data Collection)
实例 partition 百分比（占用配额百分比）: Instance Partition Percentage (Percentage of Quota Used)
实例中节点（分片或者副本）最大CPU使用率: Max CPU usage among the nodes (shards or replicas) in the instance
实例中节点（分片或者副本）最大内存使用率: Max memory usage among the nodes (shards or replicas) in the instance
实例存储的总Key个数（一级Key）: Total number of keys stored in the instance (top-level keys)
实例每秒写磁盘速度: Instance Disk Write Speed per Second
实例每秒读写磁盘速度: Instance Disk Read and Write Speed per Second
实例每秒读磁盘速度: Instance Disk Read Speed per Second
实例消费分组百分比(实例消费组数占配额百分比): Instance Consumer Group Percentage (Percentage of Quota Used by Instance Consumer Groups)
实例消费带宽百分比(实例消费带宽占配额百分比): Instance Consumption Bandwidth Percentage (Percentage of Quota Used by Instance Consumption Bandwidth)
实例消费流量（不包含副本产生的流量），按照一分钟时间粒度统计求和: Instance consumption traffic (excluding traffic generated by replicas), summed at one-minute granularity
实例消费消息峰值带宽（消费时无副本的概念）: Peak bandwidth of messages consumed by the instance (replicas do not apply to consumption)
实例消费消息条数，按照一分钟时间粒度统计求和: Number of messages consumed by the instance, summed at one-minute granularity
实例生产带宽百分比（占用配额百分比）: Instance Production Bandwidth Percentage (Percentage of Quota Used)
实例生产流量（不包含副本产生的流量），按照一分钟时间粒度统计求和: Instance production traffic (excluding traffic generated by replicas), summed at one-minute granularity
实例生产消息峰值带宽（不包含副本生产的带宽）: Peak bandwidth of messages produced by the instance (excluding bandwidth produced by replicas)
实例生产消息峰值带宽（包含副本生产的带宽）: Peak bandwidth of messages produced by the instance (including bandwidth produced by replicas)
实例生产消息条数，按照一分钟时间粒度统计求和: Number of messages produced by the instance, summed at one-minute granularity
实例磁盘占用量（包含副本），按照所选择的时间粒度取最新值: Disk space occupied by the instance (including replicas), taking the latest value at the selected time granularity
实例级别消费请求次数，按照一分钟时间粒度统计求和: Number of instance-level consumption requests, summed at one-minute granularity
实例级别生产请求次数，按照一分钟时间粒度统计求和: Number of instance-level production requests, summed at one-minute granularity
实例落盘的消息总条数（不包含副本），按照所选择的时间粒度取最新值: Total number of messages persisted to disk by the instance (excluding replicas), taking the latest value at the selected time granularity
实例连接数百分比(客户端和服务端连接数占配额百分比): Instance Connection Percentage (Percentage of Quota Used by Client and Server Connections)
实际TCP连接数量和最大连接数比: Ratio of actual TCP connections to the maximum connections
实际使用内存和申请总内存之比: Ratio of memory actually used to the total memory requested
实际使用内存容量，包含数据和缓存部分: Actually used memory capacity, including the data and cache parts
对数据库发起采集时，当前执行时间超过5s的2pc事务数量: Number of 2PC transactions running for more than 5s at the time the database is polled
对数据库发起采集时，当前的2pc事务数量: Number of current 2PC transactions at the time the database is polled
对数据库发起采集时，执行时间超过1秒的事务数量: Number of transactions running for more than 1 second at the time the database is polled
对数据库发起采集时，数据库当前总连接数: Total number of current database connections at the time the database is polled
对数据库发起采集时，数据库正在处于 idle in transaction 状态: Number of transactions in the idle in transaction state at the time the database is polled
对数据库发起采集时，数据库正在等待且超过5秒的会话数量（状态为 waiting）: Number of sessions waiting for more than 5 seconds (status waiting) at the time the database is polled
对数据库发起采集时，数据库正在等待的会话数量（状态为 waiting）: Number of waiting sessions (status waiting) at the time the database is polled
对数据库发起采集时，数据库瞬时活跃连接（非 idle 连接）: Instantaneous active connections (non-idle connections) of the database at the time the database is polled
对数据库发起采集时，显示当前剩余 xid 最少的库的剩余 xid 数量。只读实例: Remaining xid count of the database with the fewest remaining xids at the time the database is polled. Not available for read-only instances
对数据库发起采集时，查询出最近5秒内建立的所有连接数: Number of all connections established within the last 5 seconds at the time the database is polled
对数据库发起采集时，查询出来的数据库瞬时空闲连接（idle 连接）: Instantaneous idle connections of the database at the time the database is polled
对数据库发起采集时，正在执行且执行时间超过1s的 SQL 数量: Number of SQL statements running for more than 1s at the time the database is polled
对数据库发起采集时，状态处于idle in transaction且时间超过5秒: Number of transactions in the idle in transaction state for more than 5 seconds at the time the database is polled
已执行的并行查询语句数量: Number of Parallel Query Statements Executed
平均每秒执行成功的事务数（包括回滚和提交）: Average number of transactions executed successfully per second (including rollbacks and commits)
平均每秒执行的 SQL 语句数量: Average number of SQL statements executed per second
并行查询回滚到串行查询的语句数量: Number of statements rolled back from parallel query to serial query
并行查询当前使用的线程数量: Number of threads currently used by parallel queries
并行查询报错的语句数量: Number of statements that returned errors during parallel query
当前InnoDB打开表的数量: Number of tables currently opened by InnoDB
当前主题中所有分区的最大 offset: Max offset across all partitions of the current topic
当前主题所有分区中消费组消费的最大 offset: Max offset consumed by the consumer group across all partitions of the current topic
当前主题所有分区消费组未消费消息大小: Size of unconsumed messages of the consumer group across all partitions of the current topic
当前主题所有分区消费组未消费消息总和: Total unconsumed messages of the consumer group across all partitions of the current topic
当前主题所有分区消费组消费速率总和: Total consumption rate of the consumer group across all partitions of the current topic
当前磁盘占用与实例规格磁盘总容量的百分比: Percentage of current disk usage to the total disk capacity of the instance spec
总的存储空间使用率，包括临时文件、数据文件、日志文件以及其他类型的数据库文件: Total storage space usage, including temporary files, data files, log files, and other types of database files
执行时延大于slowlog-log-slower-than配置的命令次数: Number of commands whose execution latency exceeds the slowlog-log-slower-than setting
执行时长超过1秒的SQL数: Number of SQL statements running longer than 1 second
执行时长超过1秒的事务数目: Number of transactions running longer than 1 second
数据从内存写入到硬盘中的速率: Rate at which data is written from memory to disk
数据从硬盘读取到内存中的速率: Rate at which data is read from disk into memory
数据库实例监听端口上的入流量: Inbound traffic on the listening port of the database instance
数据库实例监听端口上的出流量: Outbound traffic on the listening port of the database instance
日志从主库发送至备库与备库回放完成之间的大小差异，主要反映了备库日志应用的速度，: Size difference between the log sent from the primary to the standby and the log replayed on the standby. It mainly reflects the log apply speed of the standby and can be used to evaluate standby performance and network transfer speed. Not available for read-only instances
日志从主库发送至备库与备库接收到日志并回放之间的时间差异。实例版本在10.x以上: Time difference between the log sent from the primary to the standby and the standby receiving and replaying it. Available only for instance versions 10.x and above
日志从主库发送至备库与备库接收到日志并落盘之间的时间差异。只读实例无此指标，且实: Time difference between the log sent from the primary to the standby and the standby receiving and flushing it to disk. Not available for read-only instances, and available only for instance versions 10.x and above
时间窗内被淘汰的Key个数，对应info命令输出的expired_keys: Number of keys expired within the time window, corresponding to expired_keys in the info command output
时间窗内被驱逐的Key个数，对应info命令输出的evicted_keys: Number of keys evicted within the time window, corresponding to evicted_keys in the info command output
机器运行期间实时占用的 CPU 百分比: Real-time percentage of CPU used while the machine is running
每分钟内客户端TLS握手失败数: Client TLS handshake failures per minute
每秒从内存写到硬盘中的 IO 次数: Number of IO operations written from memory to disk per second
每秒从硬盘读到内存中的 IO 次数: Number of IO operations read from disk into memory per second
每秒全表扫描记录数: Full Table Scan Rows per Second
每秒发送客户端流量: Traffic Sent to Clients per Second
每秒接收客户端流量: Traffic Received from Clients per Second
消费分组在该分区下未消费消息堆积量: Unconsumed message backlog of the consumer group on this partition
消费分组在该分区下未消费消息数: Number of unconsumed messages of the consumer group on this partition
消费分组在该分区的消费速率（条/分钟）: Consumption rate of the consumer group on this partition (messages/min)
消费分组对应当前 topic 最大 offset: Max offset of the current topic for the consumer group
消费分组当前消费 offset（区分 offset 最大值）: Current consumption offset of the consumer group (distinct from the max offset)
消费分组监控指标-主题（受模版变量 Consumer Group、Topic C: Consumer Group Metrics - Topic (Controlled by the Consumer Group and Topic Consumed Template Variables)
消费分组监控指标-分区（受模版变量 Consumer Group、Topic C: Consumer Group Metrics - Partition (Controlled by the Consumer Group, Topic Consumed, and Partition Template Variables)
消费分组该分区当前消费 offset: Current consumption offset of the consumer group on this partition
用户实际使用的内存量，不包括缓冲区与系统缓存占用的内存，总内存 - 可用内存（包: Memory actually used by users, excluding memory occupied by buffers and the system cache. It is derived as total memory minus available memory (including buffers and cached), and does not include buffers and cached. Requires the monitoring agent to be installed
用户实际使用的子机连接数与总连接数上限之比: Ratio of instance connections actually used by users to the maximum total connections
用户实际内存使用率，不包括缓冲区与系统缓存占用的内存，除去缓存、buffer 和: Actual memory usage of users, excluding memory occupied by buffers and the system cache. Excluding cache, buffer, and free memory, it is the ratio of the memory actually used by users to the total memory
硬盘有 IO 操作的时间（即非空间时间）的比率: Ratio of the time during which the disk has IO operations (that is, non-idle time)
磁盘已使用容量占总容量的百分比(所有磁盘): Percentage of used disk capacity to total capacity (all disks)
网络相关指标(需要采集云服务器内网数据): Network Metrics (Requires CVM Private Network Data Collection)
评估负载对显存占用: Assesses the GPU memory consumed by the workload
评估负载所消耗的计算能力，非空闲状态百分比: Assesses the compute capacity consumed by the workload; the percentage of non-idle time
请求命令大小超过32KB的执行次数: Number of executed commands whose request size exceeds 32KB
读写命令之外的命令执行次数，其他命令分类，请查看文档监控说明: Number of executions of commands other than read and write commands. For other command classification, see the monitoring documentation
读命令执行次数，读命令分类，请查看文档监控说明: Number of read command executions. For read command classification, see the monitoring documentation
读请求Key不存在的个数，对应info命令输出的keyspace_misses指: Number of read requests for keys that do not exist, corresponding to the keyspace_misses metric in the info command output
读请求Key存在的个数，对应info命令输出的keyspace_hits指标: Number of read requests for keys that exist, corresponding to the keyspace_hits metric in the info command output
超过5秒未提交的2PC事务数: Number of 2PC transactions uncommitted for more than 5 seconds
超过5秒的空闲事务数: Number of idle transactions longer than 5 seconds
连接到实例的TCP连接数量: Number of TCP connections to the instance
